title: ADCS ESC6: EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2 Flag Enabled via Certutil
description: Detects enabling of the EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2 policy flag on an Enterprise CA (ESC6). When set, any requester can specify an arbitrary SAN on any certificate request, allowing domain-wide impersonation. Set via 'certutil -setreg policy\EditFlags'. GOAD demonstrates this on the SRV03 CA.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*setreg*' and 'Command Line' like '*EditFlags*')) or (('Command Line' like '*EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2*' or 'Command Line' like '*ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate CA policy administration (rare; should be change-controlled)
